title: ITR-1 & 4 Forms for AY 2026-27 Notified by CBDT!
content:
# ITR-1 & 4 Forms for AY 2026-27 Notified by CBDT!

Ek important update hai! The Central Board of Direct Taxes (CBDT) ne Assessment Year (AY) 2026-27 ke liye ITR-1 (Sahaj) aur ITR-4 (Sugam) forms notify kar diye hain. Is announcement ke baad, taxpayers apni income tax returns file karne ki preparation shuru kar sakte hain.

*   **Forms Notified:** ITR-1 (Sahaj) aur ITR-4 (Sugam) forms for AY 2026-27.
*   **Official Notification Date:** April 08, 2026.
*   **Applicability:** Yeh forms Financial Year 2025-26 ki income ke liye applicable honge.
*   **ITR-1 (Sahaj) Eligibility:** Ye form resident individuals ke liye hai जिनकी total income ₹50 lakh tak hai from salary, one or two house properties, other sources (like interest), and agricultural income up to ₹5,000. Is baar, ITR-1 se do house properties tak ki income report karna possible hai, jo pehle ek tak limited tha.
*   **ITR-4 (Sugam) Eligibility:** Yeh form resident individuals, HUFs, aur firms (LLP ke alawa) ke liye hai जिनकी total income ₹50 lakh tak hai from business and profession (computed under sections 44AD, 44ADA, or 44AE), aur saath mein salary, ek house property, other sources, aur agricultural income up to ₹5,000. Ismein ab presumptive taxation choose karne wale taxpayers ko apni investments bhi report karni hogi.
*   **Governing Act:** AY 2026-27 ke liye income tax returns Income-tax Act, 1961 ke provisions ke under hi file kiye jayenge.
*   **Due Date:** Non-audit cases ke liye ITR filing ki last date 31st July 2026 hai.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.incometax.gov.in/iec/foportal/latest-updates/news-and-e-campaigns)

*Published on: 9 April 2026*
